ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pokemon" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Identifier of the Pokémon (e.g., bulbasaur) */,
  "form_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier of the Pokémon's form (e.g., None) */,
  "introduced_in_version_group_id" INTEGER /* Version group where the Pokémon was introduced */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default form of the Pokémon */,
  "is_battle_only" INTEGER /* Indicates if this form is only available in battle */,
  "is_mega" INTEGER /* Indicates if this Pokémon is a mega evolution */,
  "form_order" INTEGER /* Order of the form */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the Pokémon */,
  "type1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary type of the Pokémon */,
  "type2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the secondary type of the Pokémon (if any) */,
  "height_m" TEXT /* Height of the Pokémon in meters */,
  "weight_kg" TEXT /* Weight of the Pokémon in kilograms */,
  "base_experience" INTEGER /* Base experience points awarded for defeating the Pokémon */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the Pokémon */,
  "sprite_url" TEXT /* URL of the Pokémon's sprite image */,
  "ability1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary ability of the Pokémon */,
  "ability2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the secondary ability of the Pokémon (if any) */,
  "hidden_ability_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hidden ability of the Pokémon (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_hidden_ability_id FOREIGN KEY ("hidden_ability_id") REFERENCES abilities ("ability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_type2_id FOREIGN KEY ("type2_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_type1_id FOREIGN KEY ("type1_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_ability1_id FOREIGN KEY ("ability1_id") REFERENCES abilities ("ability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_ability2_id FOREIGN KEY ("ability2_id") REFERENCES abilities ("ability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_introduced_in_version_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("introduced_in_version_group_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version group */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version group */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evolutions" (
  "evolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon that evolves */,
  "evolved_into_pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon that it evolves into */,
  "evolution_method" TEXT /* Method of evolution (e.g., level up, item) */,
  "evolution_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the Pokémon evolves */,
  "evolution_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item required for evolution (if any) */,
  "evolution_condition" TEXT /* Additional conditions for evolution (e.g., specific time of day, specific location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_evolved_into_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("evolved_into_pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the collection */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon in the collection */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the Pokémon was added to the collection */,
  "nickname" TEXT /* Nickname given by the user to the Pokémon */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the Pokémon in the user's collection */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Current experience points of the Pokémon in the user's collection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the Pokémon (e.g., active, stored, traded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abilities" (
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ability */,
  "ability_name" TEXT /* Name of the ability */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ability_id")
)
